title: epiblastus masarangicus
intro: Epiblastus masarangicus is a species of flowering plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Epiblastus masarangicus include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever and skin infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Epiblastus masarangicus are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extract in topical applications.
